name: @beamhop/beambox
description: Dockerfile-style image builds for microsandbox — produces reusable snapshots, not OCI tarballs.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external microsandbox && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.test: bun test test/dockerfile-parser.test.ts test/resolve-image.test.ts test/run-options.test.ts test/one-shot.test.ts
